---
title: "Dames of High Estate By Henriette de Witt.  The translations edited by Charlotte M. Yonge."
---

## Dames of High Estate By Henriette de Witt.  The translations edited by Charlotte M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1869
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London: Frederick Warne and Co., Bedford Street, Covent Garden.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
